channel.title: Hacking on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Hacking on simeononsecurity

item.title: CEH v13: Cloud Computing Threats
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master cloud computing threats for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn the shared responsibility model, cloud misconfigurations, IAM weaknesses, ScoutSuite, Pacu, container escape, and CSPM.

item.title: CEH v13: Denial-of-Service
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master denial-of-service for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn DoS vs DDoS, volumetric, protocol, and application attacks, amplification, botnets, and defenses.

item.title: CEH v13: Enumeration
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master enumeration for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn NetBIOS, SNMP, LDAP, SMB, and DNS enumeration with tools like enum4linux, SNMPwalk, and NBTscan.

item.title: CEH v13: Evading IDS, Firewalls, and Honeypots
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master evading IDS, firewalls, and honeypots for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn IDS/IPS detection, packet fragmentation, firewall bypass, tunneling, and honeypot identification.

item.title: CEH v13: Footprinting and Reconnaissance
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master footprinting and reconnaissance for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn passive and active recon, OSINT, Google dorking, WHOIS, DNS, and tools like Maltego, theHarvester, and Shodan.

item.title: CEH v13: Hacking Mobile Platforms
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master hacking mobile platforms for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn Android and iOS attack surfaces, app sandboxing, malicious apps, ADB, MobSF, MDM bypass, and mobile defenses.

item.title: CEH v13: Hacking Web Applications
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master hacking web applications for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn the OWASP Top 10, Burp Suite, broken access control, injection, LFI/RFI, XXE, and secure coding defenses.

item.title: CEH v13: Hacking Web Servers
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master hacking web servers for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn web server enumeration, misconfigurations, directory traversal, common attacks, and hardening with Nikto and dirb.

item.title: CEH v13: Hacking Wireless Networks
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master hacking wireless networks for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn Wi-Fi encryption, WPA2 handshake capture, evil twin attacks, Bluetooth threats, and WPA3 defenses.

item.title: CEH v13: Introduction to Ethical Hacking
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master introduction to ethical hacking for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn the CIA triad, hacker types, the cyber kill chain, the five hacking phases, and the legal rules of engagement.

item.title: CEH v13: IoT and OT Hacking
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master IoT and OT hacking for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn IoT enumeration with Shodan, SCADA and ICS architecture, Modbus, DNP3, default credentials, and OT defenses.

item.title: CEH v13: Malware Threats
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master malware threats for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn viruses, worms, Trojans, ransomware, RATs, static and dynamic analysis, and malware countermeasures.

item.title: CEH v13: Scanning Networks
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master scanning networks for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn host discovery, Nmap port scanning, TCP scan types, OS fingerprinting, and banner grabbing.

item.title: CEH v13: Session Hijacking
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master session hijacking for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn TCP hijacking, cookie theft, session fixation, XSS token theft, and session security defenses.

item.title: CEH v13: Sniffing
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master sniffing for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn passive and active sniffing, ARP poisoning, MAC flooding, Wireshark, tcpdump, and sniffing countermeasures.

item.title: CEH v13: Social Engineering
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master social engineering for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn phishing, vishing, smishing, pretexting, impersonation, GoPhish, and awareness defenses.

item.title: CEH v13: SQL Injection
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master SQL injection for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn in-band, blind, and out-of-band injection, SQLMap, authentication bypass, and parameterized query defenses.

item.title: CEH v13: System Hacking
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master system hacking for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn password cracking, Metasploit exploitation, privilege escalation, maintaining access, and clearing tracks.

item.title: CEH v13: Vulnerability Analysis
item.category: "EC-Council CEH Course" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity" , "Network Security" , "Security Testing" , "Hacking Techniques" , "CEH Certification" , "Information Security"
item.description: Master vulnerability analysis for the EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) exam. Learn vulnerability scanning, CVSS scoring, CVE mapping, and tools like Nessus, OpenVAS, and Qualys.

item.title: Hilarious Cybersecurity Myths: Laughing at Hollywood's Hacking Fantasies
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Hacking" , "Entertainment" , "Pop Culture" , "TV Shows" , "Film" , "Technology" , "Humor" , "Digital World" , "Media"
item.description: Explore the funniest cybersecurity myths in pop culture, from 'two people typing' to 'CSI Zoom Enhance.' Discover why hacking isn't always effortless.

item.title: Assume Every Device Is Already Compromised: Strengthening Digital Security in an Interconnected World
item.category: "Personal Data Protection" , "Strong Authentication and Password Practices" , "Social Media Privacy" , "Secure Communication" , "Device Hygiene" , "Data Backup" , "Cybersecurity Best Practices" , "Digital Privacy" , "Online Security Tips" , "Protecting Sensitive Information"
item.description: Discover why you need to assume every device is already compromised and learn practical measures to enhance your digital security in today's interconnected world.

item.title: The Dark Web and Cybercrime: Unveiling the Underbelly of the Internet
item.category: "dark web" , "cybercrime" , "illegal activities" , "Tor" , "hacking" , "fraud" , "identity theft" , "journalism" , "whistleblowing" , "online security" , "personal information" , "data breaches" , "online privacy" , "government regulations" , "cybersecurity" , "crime prevention" , "anonymous browsing" , "online anonymity" , "online threats" , "digital safety"
item.description: Explore the hidden world of the dark web and its connection to cybercrime, while uncovering its dual nature and potential for journalism and whistleblowing.

item.title: 10 Common Cybersecurity Mistakes & How to Avoid Them
item.category: "cybersecurity" , "online security" , "cyber threats" , "hacking" , "phishing" , "malware" , "passwords" , "public Wi-Fi" , "antivirus" , "social media" , "data backup" , "security warnings" , "public charging stations" , "computer security" , "cybercrime prevention" , "identity theft" , "digital privacy" , "network security" , "software updates" , "online safety"
item.description: Learn how to protect yourself from cyber threats by avoiding these 10 common cybersecurity mistakes.

item.title: Protect Yourself from Hacking, Smear Campaigns, and Identity Theft: Tips for Staying Safe Online
item.category: "cybersecurity" , "online safety" , "identity theft" , "hacking" , "smear campaigns" , "social media" , "passwords" , "two-factor authentication" , "credit freeze"
item.description: Learn how to protect yourself from online threats like hacking, smear campaigns, and identity theft with these helpful tips.

item.title: HackTheBox - Challenges - Crypto - Bank Heist
item.category: "hackthebox" , "cryptography" , "T9 cipher" , "multitap cipher" , "atbash cipher" , "cyber security" , "decode" , "ciphertext" , "challenge" , "flag" , "cybersecurity" , "hacking" , "learn" , "tutorial" , "cipher decoding" , "puzzle solving" , "codebreaking" , "cryptography challenge" , "cybersecurity skills" , "online learning"
item.description: Learn how to decode T9/Multitap and Atbash ciphers to solve the Bank Heist challenge on HackTheBox.
